sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Per breakdown analysis, Pydantic per-element validation (triggered by FastAPI) is running slow on long prompt. In this PR, we replace Pydantic validation with C-loop validation which is 25x faster (e.g. 100K input tokens, 50ms -> 2ms).

This PR makes the

vllm.title: [Misc][Rocm] Remove redundant `AiterUnifiedAttentionBackend` block size log
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Minor PR to remove a redundant log on rocm when using AiterUnifiedAttentionBackend.
 vllm serve Qwen/Qwen3-0.6B --attention-backend ROCM_AITER_UNIFIED_ATTN

. . .

# This log is redundant and also should not be a warning (the user can't really take action on this) 
(EngineCore pid=1481) WARNING 05-2

vllm.title: [ROCm][CI] Stabilize Cargo cache and pre-test image checks
vllm.author: AndreasKaratzas
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR hardens ROCm CI by locking the shared Cargo registry/git BuildKit caches during the Rust frontend build, which targets the observed concurrent Cargo cache corruption without pruning or broad cache invalidation. The AMD runner now performs a lightweight in-container dependency check before si

vllm.title: fix: parse Qwen3 XML JSON arguments first
vllm.author: he-yufeng
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

parse deferred Qwen3 XML array/object parameters with JSON first
keep ast.literal_eval as a fallback for Python-literal shaped model output
add a regression test for array-of-object arguments containing JSON false and null

To verify

python -m py_compile vllm\tool_parsers\qwen3xml_tool_par

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Pass `routed_scaling_factor` to FlashInfer TRTLLM BF16 MoE
vllm.author: gau-nernst
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
routed_scaling_factor was not passed to FlashInfer TRTLLM BF16 MoE, leading to serious correctness issues. This affects all BF16 MoE models with routed_scaling_factor and apply_routed_scale_to_output=False on Blackwell.
(looks like no one runs BF16 MoE Blackwell so far 🙃)
Test Plan
Updated t

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix blocked reasoning parsing with MRV2
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Model Runner V2 does not yet support the thinking_token_budget request parameter and so fails at startup if it's enabled.
However, since #38214, the reasoning_config which enables/controls thinking token budget functionality, is auto-created when a reasoning parser is specified, meaning MRV2 fails t

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Frontend] streaming tool-call serializer drops first args chunk when name and args share a DeltaMessage
vllm.author: ignaciosica
vllm.bodyExcerpt: emit_delta in streaming_events.py only inspected delta_message.tool_calls[0] when emitting delta events. Tool parsers that emit both a name and an args DeltaToolCall within a single DeltaMessage like the KimiK2ToolParser had their first args chunk silently discarded by the serializer.

vllm.title: minor docs: fix incorrect example path
vllm.author: JINO-ROHIT
vllm.bodyExcerpt: while i was testing mooncake , the proxy file path was incorrect in the docs
